## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] Tested in browser (web build)
- [ ] Tested in Tauri (if UI or auth changes)
- [ ] No hardcoded private keys, secrets, or personal data
- [ ] New Nostr event kinds verified against NIPs + undocumented.nostrkinds.info
